objective: Implement the first #298 child slice: a deterministic org repository inventory drift detector that compares live or fixture GitHub org inventory with docs/governed_repos.json and reports current active repo coverage gaps.
scope_boundary: Add a focused org inventory drift checker under scripts/overlord.
Add fixture-backed unit tests for exact match, missing active repo, stale registry repo, warn-only mode, and archived repo cases.
Wire weekly overlord sweep to surface org inventory drift in warn-only mode.
Add issue-backed planning, exception, execution-scope, backlog, and progress artifacts for #309.
Do not add seek-and-ponder or EmailAssistant to the registry in this slice.
out_of_scope: Extending the registry schema classification model, which is tracked by #310.
Claiming final org-wide governance e2e completion.
research_summary: Issue #298 established that every active org repo must be present in governance and that live org inventory currently includes seek-and-ponder and EmailAssistant beyond the six canonical governed repos. This slice implements the detector and sweep surfacing only, leaving schema-classification enforcement to #310 and intake to #311/#312.

sprints.name: Detector And Fixtures
sprints.goal: Create a deterministic checker that can run from fixtures locally and from GitHub CLI in sweep.
tasks: Support --inventory-file fixture mode and --live GitHub CLI mode.
Report missing active repos, stale registry repos, archived registry repos, and archived unregistered repos.
Add text, markdown, and JSON output modes.
Add --warn-only for weekly sweep surfacing before enforcement.
acceptance_criteria: Missing active repo exits 1 unless --warn-only is set.
Archived registry repos are blocking until #310 adds explicit classification semantics.

sprints.name: Sweep Surfacing
sprints.goal: Surface org inventory drift in weekly sweep without failing the scheduled run while current gaps remain open.
tasks: Add an Org Repository Inventory Drift section to overlord-sweep.
Run the checker in --live --warn-only --format markdown mode.
Keep hard enforcement out of sweep until current known gaps are classified by #310-#312.
acceptance_criteria: Sweep report contains org inventory drift section.
Known active omissions are visible in report output.
Drift detection failure does not prevent weekly reporting while warn-only mode is active.
Unexpected checker execution errors still fail the workflow.

sprints.name: Final E2E Proof
sprints.goal: Prove this slice catches the current #298 gap and records the command output.
tasks: Run live GitHub org inventory command locally.
Run Local CI Gate for the changed files.
Post evidence to #309 and link it from #298.
acceptance_criteria: Final AC: live org drift command reports seek-and-ponder and EmailAssistant as missing active repos while registry is unchanged.
Final AC: warn-only live mode exits 0 with markdown report.
Final AC: Local CI Gate passes for changed paths.
Final AC: #309 remains open unless PR and e2e evidence are linked.

specialist_reviews.focus: Detector behavior, fixture coverage, sweep warn-only semantics, and #298 final e2e alignment.
specialist_reviews.summary: No blockers or high-risk gaps found. Review confirmed docs/governed_repos.json remains unchanged, fixture tests pass, live blocking mode reports EmailAssistant and seek-and-ponder as missing active repos, and warn-only markdown mode exits successfully while reporting both repos.

alternate_model_review.reviewer: not requested for focused implementation slice
alternate_model_review.summary: This slice adds focused tooling/tests and does not change standards semantics. Cross-family review remains required for standards/schema semantics changes in #310 or later.

execution_handoff.approved_scope_summary: Issue #309 may add the inventory drift checker, tests, sweep report wiring, planning/status artifacts, same-family exception, and implementation execution scope. It may not alter registry coverage or downstream repos.
execution_handoff.next_execution_step: Implement detector, tests, sweep surfacing, run final e2e commands, then open PR for #309.

material_deviation_rules: If registry schema changes are needed, stop and move that work to #310.
If seek-and-ponder or EmailAssistant intake is needed, stop and move that work to #311 or #312.
If live GitHub CLI inventory cannot run, keep fixture tests and record the live-mode blocker on #309.
If sweep hard-fails due expected current drift, revert to warn-only mode until #310-#312 classify known gaps.
If final live command does not report the current missing active repos, do not publish.
approved_by: operator instruction: follow repo rules, no HITL, e2e testing as final AC
